equipmentMods.amulet: Убийство монстра или попадание по элите/боссу пока активна Кровожадность, даёт 10% шанс получить заряд Жизни, увеличивающий ваше Здоровье на 1% за каждый заряд (суммируется до 100)
equipmentMods.belt: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
equipmentMods.bracer: Получаете бонус к Базовому Урону, равный 1% от вашего Максимального Здоровья
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.helmet: Landing a critical strike has a chance to provide a stack of Excitement, providing 3% all Elemental Damage. At 6 stacks, become the Juggernaut - gaining +25% size, +40% movement speed, +25% critical chance and double your critical damage bonus.
equipmentMods.horn: Статический Заряд: Получает заряды нанося урон противникам. Каждый заряд даёт +1% к урону Молнией. При достижении 100 зарядов призывает молнии на поле боя.
equipmentMods.relic: Убивая Заряженного жука, вы делитесь наградой со всем братством.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1.5% Critical Damage for every 10 essence collected.
equipmentMods.ring1: Получаете дополнительный +0.1% к Максимальному Здоровью за каждый заряд Жизни, за каждые 50 единиц вашей наивысшей характеристики
equipmentMods.ring2: Получаете дополнительный +0.1% к Максимальному Здоровью за каждый заряд Жизни, за каждые 50 единиц вашей наивысшей характеристики

equipmentMods.helmet: Gain 3 base Elemental Damage for every Energy point above 100.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.

equipmentMods.belt: Rain of Flames: Fire an two additional meteors.

equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 5% maximum Health per Dark Shroud stacks.
equipmentMods.belt: Rain of Flames: Fire an two additional meteors.
equipmentMods.bracer: Erhalte Basis-Schaden in Höhe von 1 % deines Maximal-Lebens
equipmentMods.goblet: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.

equipmentMods.amulet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.belt: Arcano Apocalíptico: Aumenta o tamanho da explosão em 30%. Quando uma explosão acerta, tem 25% de chance de ganhar 2% de buff de dano Arcano, que aumula até 75.
equipmentMods.goblet: Estelâminas: ganhe uma lâmina adicional que causa 75% de dano.
equipmentMods.helmet: Eliminar um inimigo de elite agora tem 10% de chance de criar uma Lesma Amadora.
equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: For each extra blade, all blades deal 75% additional damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Estelâminas: ganhe uma lâmina adicional que causa 75% de dano.

equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Dragon Flame: The dragon stays for additional 2 seconds on the battlefield.
Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma now grows 20% longer in range, attacks 13.33% faster, and hits 2 additional time. (this mod can be stacked up to 3 times)
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
